2604.14054.title: $π$-Play: Multi-Agent Self-Play via Privileged Self-Distillation without External Data
2604.14054.paper_summary: Deep search agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for addressing complex information-seeking tasks, but their training remains challenging due to sparse rewards, weak credit assignment, and limited labeled data. Self-play offers a scalable route to reduce data dependence, but conventional self-play optimizes students only through sparse outcome rewards, leading to low learning efficiency. In this work, we observe that self-play naturally produces a question construction path (QCP) during task generation, an intermediate artifact that captures the reverse solution process. This reveals a new source of privileged information for self-distillation: self-play can itself provide high-quality privileged context for the teacher model in a low-cost and scalable manner, without relying on human feedback or curated privileged information. Leveraging this insight, we propose Privileged Information Self-Play ($π$-Play), a multi-agent self-evolution framework. In $π$-Play, an examiner generates tasks together with their QCPs, and a teacher model leverages QCP as privileged context to densely supervise a student via self-distillation. This design transforms conventional sparse-reward self-play into a dense-feedback self-evolution loop. Extensive experiments show that data-free $π$-Play surpasses fully supervised search agents and improves evolutionary efficiency by 2-3$\times$ over conventional self-play.
2604.14054.paper_summary_zh: 深度搜索代理已成為解決複雜信息尋求任務的一個有前景的範式，但由於稀疏獎勵、弱信用分配和有限的標記數據，其訓練仍然具有挑戰性。自我對弈提供了一條可擴展的路徑來減少對數據的依賴，但傳統的自我對弈僅通過稀疏的結果獎勵來優化學生，導致學習效率低下。在這項工作中，我們觀察到自我對弈在任務生成過程中自然產生了一條問題構建路徑（QCP），這是一種捕捉反向解決過程的中介產物。這揭示了自我蒸餾的新特權信息來源：自我對弈本身可以以低成本和可擴展的方式為教師模型提供高質量的特權上下文，而無需依賴人類反饋或精心策劃的特權信息。利用這一見解，我們提出了特權信息自我對弈（$π$-Play），這是一個多代理自我演化框架。在$π$-Play中，考官生成任務及其QCP，教師模型利用QCP作為特權上下文，通過自我蒸餾對學生進行密集監督。這一設計將傳統的稀疏獎勵自我對弈轉變為一個密集反饋的自我演化循環。大量實驗表明，無數據的$π$-Play超越了完全監督的搜索代理，並將演化效率提高了2-3$\times$，相較於傳統的自我對弈。
2604.14054.author: Yaocheng Zhang et.al.
2604.14054.authors: Yaocheng Zhang, Yuanheng Zhu, Wenyue Chong, Songjun Tu, Qichao Zhang, Jiajun Chai, Xiaohan Wang, Wei Lin, Guojun Yin, Dongbin Zhao
